title: tephrosia linearis var. linearis
intro: Tephrosia linearis var. linearis, also known as the 'Slender Horsefly Tree', is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The health benefits of Tephrosia linearis var. linearis include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, malaria, and respiratory infections, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Tephrosia linearis var. linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional African medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
